description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly reddish-brown coloration and subtle variations in hue across its surface. The stone features a combination of smooth and angular facets, with some areas displaying natural weathering marks and slight discoloration, possibly from exposure to the elements. Its surface is mostly matte with a rough texture, and there are visible veins and mottled patches that add to its natural appearance. The edges are uneven, with some sharper ridges and flatter planes, suggesting it may have been fractured or chipped. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or artificial modifications. Its overall form and coloration make it suitable as a natural obstacle or decorative element in urban parks, sidewalks, or landscaped areas.
description: A reddish-brown, irregularly shaped stone with rough, matte surfaces and natural weathering marks. It features angular facets, mottled patches, and subtle veins, giving it a realistic, solid appearance.
description_view_0: This view highlights the broadest, flattest face of the stone, showing its reddish-brown color and mottled surface with visible weathering marks.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the stone's narrowest profile, emphasizing its angular edge and the transition between lighter and darker patches.
description_view_2: This angle displays another wide face with more pronounced dark mottling and subtle surface veins, giving a sense of depth and texture.
description_view_3: This view shows the stone's sharpest edge and a mix of smooth and rough surfaces, with visible color gradients and natural imperfections.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and subtle veining with no artificial carvings; natural, non-repetitive patterning.
attribute_weathering: Rough with visible weathering marks and slight discoloration, indicating moderate exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved surfaces but blends naturally with soil, gravel, or planted areas; may be partially surrounded by grass or mulch.
